messages.author: Mistial Dev
messages.text: I am working on alternate FW for meshcore nodes. The first is a pager node, which is based on the client and does either USB or Bluetooth. The second role is a dispatcher, which is a specialized room for pagers.
messages.content_html: I am working on alternate FW for meshcore nodes. The first is a pager node, which is based on the client and does either USB or Bluetooth. The second role is a dispatcher, which is a specialized room for pagers.
messages.reactions_html: 1

messages.author: Will (WA)
messages.text: Just getting rooms to work correctly might be a good first step
messages.content_html: Just getting rooms to work correctly might be a good first step

messages.author: Mistial Dev
messages.text: That's part of what I've been working on, lol. In pager mode, once you join the room, it stores that as the primary room and will try to reconnect to it. I've got it set to complain if it can't.
messages.content_html: That's part of what I've been working on, lol. In pager mode, once you join the room, it stores that as the primary room and will try to reconnect to it. I've got it set to complain if it can't.

messages.author: Mistial Dev
messages.text: what kind of problems do you have?
messages.content_html: what kind of problems do you have?

Will (WA)
Just getting rooms to work correctly might be a good first step

messages.author: Will (WA)
messages.text: I haven't spent enough time with them to enumerate them meaningfully, just feels buggy right now.

messages.author: Mistial Dev
messages.text: https://github.com/meshcore-dev/MeshCore/compare/main...mistial-dev:MeshCore:feat-paging <- kind of the direction I'm going in. Going to end up refactoring more of the logic out of the core FW and into helpers and pager-specific files.
messages.content_html: https://github.com/meshcore-dev/MeshCore/compare/main...mistial-dev:MeshCore:feat-paging <- kind of the direction I'm going in. Going to end up refactoring more of the logic out of the core FW and into helpers and pager-specific files.

messages.author: Mistial Dev
messages.text: Dispatcher is coming along. Still occasionally hangs, WDT isn't picking it up yet. Shows up as a room, can be connected to, messages, handles admin commands, has CLI and basic help.
messages.content_html: Dispatcher is coming along. Still occasionally hangs, WDT isn't picking it up yet. Shows up as a room, can be connected to, messages, handles admin commands, has CLI and basic help.
